missions.title: Optimize Your Instagram Bio
missions.description: Update your Instagram bio to clearly state what you do, who you help, and include a call-to-action. Use keywords relevant to your niche.
missions.impact: Brands search by keywords — your profile is now findable
missions.completion_prompt: Paste your updated Instagram bio below

missions.title: Add a Link in Bio
missions.description: Set up a link in bio page (Linktree, Beacons, or your own site) and add it to all your social profiles. Link to at least 2 things: your latest content and a way to contact/work with you.
missions.impact: Every platform you're on now points to one place
missions.completion_prompt: Paste your link-in-bio URL

missions.title: Post a Brand-Aligned Photo
missions.description: Post a photo that represents your brand aesthetic. Use 5–10 relevant hashtags, write a caption that invites engagement (question or call-to-action), and tag your location.
missions.impact: Your brand aesthetic is out in the world
missions.completion_prompt: Paste the URL or screenshot of your post

missions.title: Set Up Your TikTok Creator Profile
missions.description: Optimize your TikTok bio, add your niche keywords, link your other platforms, and post one short clip (15–30 sec) showcasing your gaming style.
missions.impact: You're discoverable on one of the fastest-growing creator platforms
missions.completion_prompt: Paste your TikTok profile URL

missions.title: Connect Your Social Accounts
missions.description: Link your Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook account to CreatorLevel so we can track your growth and personalize your missions.
missions.impact: Your growth is now being tracked in one place
missions.completion_prompt: Connect at least one platform using the Connect tab

missions.title: Create a 7-Day Content Calendar
missions.description: Plan 7 days of content across your top platform. Include post type (photo/video/story/reel), topic, and target publish time for each day. Use the template in the Templates tab.
missions.impact: Consistency is what separates hobbyists from professionals
missions.completion_prompt: Upload or paste your 7-day content calendar

missions.title: Send Your First Brand Collab DM
missions.description: Identify a brand in your niche that aligns with your values (doesn't have to be a huge brand — local or micro-brands are great). Use the Brand Collab DM template from the Templates tab and send it.
missions.impact: You put yourself in front of a brand — most creators never do this
missions.completion_prompt: Screenshot or describe who you reached out to and the platform

missions.title: Send Your First Sponsorship Inquiry
missions.description: Research a gaming peripheral, energy drink, or gaming chair brand. Use the Brand Collab DM template, customize it for gaming, and send it via Twitter/X DM or email.
missions.impact: You put yourself in front of a sponsor — most creators never do this
missions.completion_prompt: Describe the brand you contacted and which platform you used

missions.title: Propose a Collab to Another Creator
missions.description: Find a creator in a complementary niche (similar audience size). Use the Creator Collab Proposal template and send it. A collab could be a joint post, shoutout swap, or co-created content.
missions.impact: Collabs are how creators grow each other's audiences
missions.completion_prompt: Who did you reach out to and what collab did you propose?

missions.title: Run an Audience Engagement Post
missions.description: Post a high-engagement content piece: a poll, 'this or that', 'ask me anything', or a challenge. Use the Audience Engagement template. Goal is replies and shares, not just likes.
missions.impact: Engagement tells the algorithm your audience is real
missions.completion_prompt: Paste the post URL or screenshot with engagement stats

missions.title: Cross-Post to a Second Platform
missions.description: Creators who post across 2+ platforms grow 3x faster. Take your best-performing post from one platform and repost it to a second one today. Use the same caption — it takes under 5 minutes.
missions.impact: Every new platform is a new audience discovering you
missions.completion_prompt: Which platforms did you cross-post between, and what was the post about?

missions.title: Send Your Media Kit to 2 Brands
missions.description: Export your CreatorLevel media kit and send it to 2 brands using the PR Pitch Email template. Include your stats, audience demographics, and rate card.
missions.impact: Your media kit is in a brand's inbox
missions.completion_prompt: Name the 2 brands you pitched and the email addresses used
missions.achievement_title: Media Kit Sent to a Brand

missions.title: Pitch a Feature to a Niche Blog or Newsletter
missions.description: Find a blog, newsletter, or online magazine in your niche that features creators. Use the PR Feature Pitch template to pitch a story about your journey or expertise.
missions.impact: One feature can bring more visibility than months of posting
missions.completion_prompt: Paste the publication name and your pitch subject line

missions.title: Apply to a Gaming Creator Program
missions.description: Apply to at least one brand creator program (e.g. Razer Streamer Program, HyperX Creator, Twitch Affiliate). Use the Brand Collab DM template adapted for formal applications.
missions.impact: Official programs mean recurring gear, exposure, and income
missions.completion_prompt: Which program did you apply to? Paste the application confirmation

missions.title: Apply to a Gaming Brand Ambassador Program
missions.description: Research and apply to a hardware or lifestyle brand ambassador program — Razer, SteelSeries, HyperX, G Fuel, or Monster Energy all run active programs. Ambassador deals often include free gear + revenue share.
missions.impact: Ambassador deals are how gaming creators build stable income
missions.completion_prompt: Which brand did you apply to and what perks does the program offer?

missions.title: Apply for Twitch Affiliate or Partner
missions.description: If you haven't already, apply for Twitch Affiliate (requires 50 followers, 500 total minutes broadcast, 7 unique broadcast days, avg 3 viewers). Affiliate unlocks subscriptions, bits, and ad revenue — your first real recurring income as a gaming creator.
missions.impact: Affiliate is your first step to earning directly from your audience
missions.completion_prompt: Paste your Twitch dashboard screenshot showing affiliate/partner status or application submission

missions.title: Go Live or Post a Long-Form Reel/Video
missions.description: Go live for 20+ minutes or post a reel/video over 60 seconds. Announce it in your stories 24 hours before. This demonstrates active audience engagement to brands reviewing your media kit.
missions.impact: Live content shows brands your audience shows up in real time
missions.completion_prompt: Paste the link to your live replay or video

missions.title: Create or Optimize Your LinkedIn Profile
missions.description: Set up a professional LinkedIn presence. Add a creator headline, about section that frames your creator business as a company, and link your portfolio or media kit. Connect with 10 industry professionals.
missions.impact: Investors and brand managers check LinkedIn first
missions.completion_prompt: Paste your LinkedIn profile URL

missions.title: Pitch Yourself to a Podcast
missions.description: Find a podcast in your industry (creator economy, your niche, entrepreneurship). Use the PR Pitch Email template to pitch yourself as a guest. Include your story angle, audience stats, and media kit link.
missions.impact: A podcast appearance builds authority no follower count can buy
missions.completion_prompt: Which podcast did you pitch? Paste the show name and your pitch

missions.title: Submit a Press Feature Request
missions.description: Submit yourself to HARO (Help a Reporter Out) or Qwoted as a creator/entrepreneur source. Alternatively, pitch a local business journal or creator economy publication with your story.
missions.impact: Press coverage is the credibility that opens doors
missions.completion_prompt: Describe where you submitted and your pitch angle

missions.title: Share Your Creator Story on LinkedIn
missions.description: Write a long-form LinkedIn post (300–600 words) sharing your creator journey, a key lesson, or a milestone. Tag relevant brands or creators. This builds professional credibility with investors and partners.
missions.impact: Your story is now part of the professional conversation
missions.completion_prompt: Paste the link to your LinkedIn post

missions.title: Pitch to an Esports Organization or Gaming Agency
missions.description: Research esports orgs (100 Thieves, FaZe Clan, NRG, etc.) or gaming talent agencies (Loaded, Evolved Talent, Clout). Send a pitch email or apply via their creator programs — include your stream stats, avg viewership, VOD performance, and clip highlights.
missions.impact: Esports orgs are always looking for the next breakout creator
missions.completion_prompt: Which org or agency did you pitch? Describe your pitch angle and include your key stats

missions.title: Create a Gaming Creator Media Kit
missions.description: Build a media kit specifically for gaming — include your peak and avg concurrent viewers, subscriber/follower counts across Twitch/YouTube/TikTok, top clip views, audience demographics (age, region, devices), and a rate card for sponsorships. This is what brand managers and agencies expect.
missions.impact: Brand managers expect this — now you're ready for the conversation
missions.completion_prompt: Upload or paste a link to your completed gaming media kit
